name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for Agora
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

> Agora is deliberately **biased and minimal** — it prefers picking the one best
> option over exposing many. Proposals that *remove* a decision from the user are
> especially welcome; proposals that add configuration surface need a strong case.

**The problem**

<!-- What intent-gap, alignment failure, or workflow friction are you hitting?
     Concrete example over abstract description. -->

**The idea**

<!-- What you'd like Agora to do. -->

**Does it touch the philosophy or architecture?**

<!-- Adding a 6th philosopher, a new gate, or changing a loop is an architectural
     change and needs an ADR + a philosophy doc (see CONTRIBUTING.md / ADR-0007).
     A new philosopher is intentionally hard to add — make the case here first. -->
